---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Problem / motivation

What user or workflow pain does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior or UX you want. Mockups or links welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What else could work?

## Scope notes

- Affects which area: transcription / corpus / collaboration / other
- Breaking data or API changes: yes / no / unknown

## Related

Issues, ADRs, or discussion links.
